title: Environmental assessment and evidence: North Sea and Channel sprat fisheries management plan (FMP)
body: "The strategic environmental assessment (SEA) evaluates the potential positive and negative environmental effects of the proposed policies in the North Sea and Channel sprat fisheries management plan (FMP).   This environmental report sets out the findings of the SEA.   You can also read the non-technical summary of the report.   Read more about fisheries management plans.  "
